case_title: LITKE, EDWARD vs. QUISPE, RAFAEL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LITKE, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT QUISPE, RAFAEL DOES L1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
